name: Community Bank And Trust Company
description_short: Community Bank & Trust is a hometown community bank serving Iowa with full-service banking including checking, savings, loans, and wealth management across five local branches.
description_long:
Community Bank & Trust operates as a traditional community bank headquartered in Iowa, serving Columbus Junction, Muscatine, Wapello, Wilton, and surrounding areas. The institution positions itself around a core motto of 'We put people first,' emphasizing local decision-making and personalized service typical of regional banks.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of consumer and business banking products. On the deposit side, they provide checking accounts, savings accounts, and CD/IRA products. Their lending portfolio includes personal loans (home, auto, personal lines), business loans (operating lines of credit, real estate loans, term loans, construction loans, SBA guarantee loans), agriculture loans, and student loans. Additional services include online banking, mobile banking, wire transfers, credit cards, check ordering, and financial calculators. They also provide trust and wealth management services with dedicated retirement account access.

Community Bank & Trust distinguishes itself through its local presence and community focus. The bank maintains five physical branches, enabling in-person service that larger national banks may not match. They actively partner with community organizations like the Iowa Bankers Association for member benefits. The website emphasizes their commercial lending expertise and willingness to work with both established and expanding businesses.

As a regional bank, Community Bank & Trust offers traditional banking advantages like personal relationships and local decision-making. However, the website provides limited transparency regarding specific rates, fees, minimum balances, or account terms. Their digital presence is functional but basic. The bank appears well-established but offers no information about FDIC insurance, account protection details, or specific loan terms that would help consumers make informed comparisons with larger competitors. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Business loans and operating lines of credit
pros: Five local branch locations across Iowa (Columbus Junction, Muscatine-2 locations, Wapello, Wilton)
Comprehensive business lending programs including SBA guarantee loans, construction loans, and operating lines of credit
24/7 access to ATMs, website, and mobile app even during branch holidays
Full-service offerings including trust and wealth management services
Active community partnerships, such as with Iowa Bankers Association for promotional benefits
Online banking, mobile app, and wire transfer capabilities available
Dedicated agricultural lending products for farming customers
cons: Website lacks specific information on interest rates, APRs, fees, or minimum account balances
Limited geographic footprint compared to regional or national banks
No transparency on account terms, FDIC insurance details, or loan origination processes
Website content appears dated (references 2017 year-end closing and Presidents Day 2018 hours)
No information about credit card rewards, terms, or competitive advantages over national card issuers
best_for: Rural and small-town residents in central Iowa seeking local banking relationships
Small to mid-sized business owners needing agricultural or commercial lending with personalized service
Customers preferring in-person banking interactions and local decision-making over large national banks
diagnosis: Community Bank & Trust is best suited for Iowa residents and business owners in or near their service areas who value local banking relationships and personalized service. The main caveat is that the website lacks critical transparency on rates, fees, and specific terms, making it difficult for consumers to evaluate competitive positioning against larger regional or national banks without direct contact.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Community Bank & Trust serves Iowa with full-service banking including checking, savings, loans, and wealth management across five branches.
